visualizations.title: Scaling Fractions
visualizations.description: Rules for generating equivalent fractions by scaling the numerator and denominator.

steps.explanation: Scaling Up: Multiply both parts by the same number k. Since k/k = 1, the value does not change.
Scaling Down: Divide both parts by a common factor m to simplify the fraction.

visualizations.title: Comparing Shaded Fractions
visualizations.description: Observe that 1/2, 2/4, and 4/8 cover the exact same physical length on identical bars.
